title: Operational Maturity

assumptions.text: Grant agreement signature estimated Q1 2027. Actual date depends on Innovation Fund evaluation timeline.
No operational due diligence reports available. Market analysis from SOTA summary used for market positioning.
Brindisi site remediation status (completed, in progress, not required) must be confirmed by Eni.
FTE employment figures (construction and operation) not specified. To be confirmed by project team.
CVs and track records of named key personnel must be provided for Participant Information annex.
Permit timeline assumes typical Italian regulatory processing times. Actual timelines may vary.

open_issues.text: Project organisation diagram (copy from business plan) to be prepared and included in this section.
Gantt chart annex to be prepared showing all milestones consistent with this implementation plan.
Permitting pre-consultation status with Regione Puglia and Comune di Brindisi should be documented with letters/minutes if available.

evaluation_criterion: 3.3 — Operational maturity (max 5, min pass 3, weight x2 = max 10 weighted points)

scoring_targets.implementation_timeline: Comprehensive M0-M108 timeline with FC within 2yr and EiO within 4yr
scoring_targets.permitting_plan: Italian VIA/AIA/building permits with timeline estimates
scoring_targets.team_qualifications: Roles defined; CVs flagged as outstanding
scoring_targets.governance: Three-tier governance (steering, technical, DT working group)
scoring_targets.public_acceptance: Industrial area, brownfield reuse, job creation argument
scoring_targets.consistency_with_wp: Timeline consistent with WP1-WP7 structure in Section 7
